name: O-4 (SS-65)
events: 5 Sep 1942 USS O-4 departed New London, Connecticut for Casco Bay, Maine.
6 Sep 1942 USS O-4 arrived at Casco Bay, Maine from New London, Connecticut.
3 Oct 1942 USS O-4 departed Casco Bay, Maine for New London, Connecticut.
4 Oct 1942 USS O-4 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Casco Bay, Maine.
